dev_env_state.orchestrator: node start.mjs --no-browser (PID 1521 initiated, stopped cleanly via node start.mjs --stop at session end)

primary.password: <redacted — dev-only test user, password generated session-local and not committed>
primary.registered_via: POST /api/auth/register with role=manager (TZ-91 A.1 DTO whitelist allows user|manager); session-local dev password, redacted from archive to avoid credential leak

tried_passwords: <legacy seed fallback candidates, exact values redacted from archive>
secondary_failed.result: all 401 — TZ-91 admin-password-drift-detector warns ADMIN_PASSWORD env does not match bcrypt hash stored for admin user

secondary_failed_via_email_field.result: 400 Bad Request — login DTO does not accept {email,password} shape; only {username,password}

blockers_discovered.detail: GET /api/organizations returned 0 items in fresh dev DB; only DocTypes seeded (6 items).
blockers_discovered.impact: Cannot satisfy ValidationPipe required organizationId reference for POST /api/document-templates (400 Bad Request: organizationId must be 24-char hex ObjectId).

blockers_discovered.detail: frontend/src/app/pages/doc-constructor/builder/builder.page.ts picker has no '+ Create template' button on empty state. Browser-use agent confirmed empirically.
blockers_discovered.impact: User cannot reach 3-pane builder canvas through the UI flow with empty database — only via direct API POST + manual nav to /doc-constructor/builder/:id.

blockers_discovered.detail: TZ-91 admin-password-drift-detector warns ADMIN_PASSWORD env does not match stored bcrypt hash for admin user. Both admin and a11y_audit (admin role) seeded with hashes that don't unlock via any candidate password.
blockers_discovered.impact: Cannot login as admin via UI. f3mgr fallback used. Out of TZ-87 scope — should be tracked in TZ-91-extension backlog.

blockers_discovered.detail: TZ-91 5 req/min, 20 req/hour throttler on /api/auth/login. Burst of 8+ manual auth probes during recovery exhausted per-minute window.
blockers_discovered.impact: Login attempts deliver 429 Too Many Requests for ~60s window. Workaround: sleep 65s between login bursts.

lessons_observed: /doc-constructor/builder picker does NOT show a 'Create template' button when empty — empirically confirmed. TZ-87 candidate should add this UI affordance.
browser_use_session.navigation_results: 1 login + 3 list-style routes = 4 visual checkpoints captured; 3-pane canvas unreachable without seeded DocumentTemplate

sub_tasks_proposed: B.1 — Backend dev-fixtures seed (Organization + Counterparty + DocTypes) under NODE_ENV guard
B.2 — Frontend 'Create template' inline button on empty picker state
B.3 — Re-run TZ-86 F.3 verification with seeded data, capture screenshots 05-07
B.4 — Docs sync + lock file + status update
